Computational Protein Engineering at Auburn University

Research Focus

Our team creates and employs computational protein design tools to understand novel approaches to protein engineering. Using the fundamentals of Molecular Mechanics, Thermodynamics, Machine Learning and other concepts, we aim to unlock the full potential of proteins and peptides.

BIOSENS

Entropy Modeling

SARS-COV-2

Ideal Therapeutic Protein

Pantazes Research lab

Auburn University

Auburn, AL 36849

Powered by Squarespace
